title: The Three Fantastic Supermen
writer: Gianfranco Parolini, Marcello Coscia, Theo Maria Werner
actors: Tony Kendall, Brad Harris, Aldo Canti
plot: FBI agent Brad joins Tony and Nick, the self styled Supermen who battle crime wearing bullet-proof super-suits. They are on a case involving radioactive counterfeit money and people who can be broken down into precious jewels.
